# Powertools for AWS Lambda (Python)

> Powertools for AWS Lambda (Python)

Powertools for AWS Lambda (Python) is a developer toolkit to implement Serverless best practices and increase developer velocity. It provides a suite of utilities for AWS Lambda Functions that makes tracing with AWS X-Ray, structured logging and creating custom metrics asynchronously easier.

## Project Overview

- [Homepage](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/index.md)
- [Changelog](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/changelog/index.md)
- [Upgrade guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/upgrade/index.md)
- [Roadmap](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/roadmap/index.md)

## Core Utilities

- [Tracer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/tracer/index.md)
- [Logger](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/logger/index.md)
- [Metrics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/metrics/index.md)
- [Amazon CloudWatch EMF](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/metrics/index.md)
- [Datadog](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/metrics/datadog/index.md)
- [REST API](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/event_handler/api_gateway/index.md)
- [GraphQL API](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/event_handler/appsync/index.md)
- [AppSync Events](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/event_handler/appsync_events/index.md)
- [Amazon Bedrock Agents](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/core/event_handler/bedrock_agents/index.md)

## Utilities

- [Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/parameters/index.md)
- [Batch Processing](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/batch/index.md)
- [Typing](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/typing/index.md)
- [Kafka Consumer](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/kafka/index.md)
- [Validation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/validation/index.md)
- [Event Source Data Classes](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/data_classes/index.md)
- [Parser (Pydantic)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/parser/index.md)
- [Idempotency](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/idempotency/index.md)
- [Data Masking](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/data_masking/index.md)
- [Feature flags](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/feature_flags/index.md)
- [Metadata](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/metadata/index.md)
- [Streaming](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/streaming/index.md)
- [Middleware factory](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/middleware_factory/index.md)
- [JMESPath Functions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/powertools/python/latest/utilities/jmespath_functions/index.md)
